summary: Iteration 4 testing for EndocrinoPront Pro - Agenda (Appointments) Module. All 22 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend Agenda page fully functional: listing appointments, date navigation, new appointment modal, and appointment creation all working correctly.

issues: Missing data-testid attributes on interactive elements (buttons, inputs, selects). Recommend adding for better testability.

action_items: MINOR: Add data-testid attributes to schedule-page.tsx for better testability (e.g., data-testid='new-appointment-btn', data-testid='patient-select', etc.)

CARRIED OVER (CRITICAL from iter2/iter3): Consultation autosave field name mismatch - frontend sends {subjetivo,objetivo,avaliacao,plano} but backend expects {anamnese,exameFisico,diagnostico,prescricao}. Fix in /app/src/lib/api/consultation-api.ts.
critical_code_review_comments: Agenda module code is well-structured with proper separation of concerns (service, controller, DTOs)
Frontend uses React Query for data fetching with proper cache invalidation on mutation success
Time format validation regex in DTO is correct: /^([01]\d|2[0-3]):([0-5]\d)$/
Date filtering in service uses exact date match which works correctly for PostgreSQL DATE type

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all features working: list, filter by date, create, date navigation)

seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up test appointments during testing. One appointment remains: cmm9vucpd0007g2ukxcpz47sj (Camila Meireles Silva, 2026-03-03 09:30, RETORNO, CONFIRMADO)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 4 complete. Agenda module fully tested and working. Backend endpoints: GET /api/v1/agenda (list all), GET /api/v1/agenda?date=YYYY-MM-DD (filter by date), GET /api/v1/agenda/:id (get by ID), POST /api/v1/agenda (create), PATCH /api/v1/agenda/:id (update), DELETE /api/v1/agenda/:id (remove), GET /api/v1/agenda/patient/:patientId (list by patient). All return proper status codes and data. Frontend schedule-page.tsx works correctly with date navigation, appointment listing, and new appointment modal. Auth: NestJS backend localhost:8001, Vite/React frontend localhost:3000, Neon PostgreSQL. The frontend baseURL is /api/v1 (relative, via vite proxy). OUTSTANDING BUG (from iter2/iter3): Consultation autosave field name mismatch still not fixed.
verified_features: POST /api/v1/agenda creates appointment with all types (PRIMEIRA_CONSULTA, RETORNO, TELECONSULTA, EXAME) ✓
Frontend Agenda page loads and displays appointments ✓
Frontend 'Novo agendamento' modal opens and creates appointments ✓
Frontend shows 'Nenhum agendamento para este dia' for empty dates ✓
Query invalidation on create: list updates after new appointment ✓
